title: Assistant Professor in Cognitive Science, AI & the Mind
description: Seeks researchers advancing work at the intersection of AI and human cognition — through modeling, experimentation, or theory. Tenure home will be in the most appropriate department (CS, Education, Information Science, Psychology & Neuroscience, or Linguistics). Interdisciplinary and innovative approaches encouraged.
application_materials: Statement of teaching philosophy and experience
Three publications demonstrating research focus (combined PDF)
Three references (names and contact info; letters requested if advanced)

title: Open Rank Faculty Position in K-12 Ethnic Studies Education
description: Seeks a scholar focused on the teaching, curriculum, or effects of ethnic studies in K–12 contexts. Open to all disciplines, theoretical frameworks, and methodological approaches. Faculty will teach and advise preservice teachers and doctoral students and contribute to programmatic leadership.
application_materials: Research and teaching statement (3 pages max)
Three scholarly publications and/or well-developed papers
Three references (letters requested upon submission for non-tenured applicants; at later stage for tenured applicants)
